description: Adds two 3D vectors component-wise, returning the resultant sum vector. Uses the displacement of each input. Can also be done via trace3d(G, V, type(sum), W).
utility: Add two 3D vectors and return the resultant vector

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
A = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 3, 0, 0)
B = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 0, 2, 0)
S = vecsum3d(G, A, B)

G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
A = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 2, 1, 0, c(red))
B = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1, 2, c(blue))
S = vecsum3d(G, A, B, c(green))
